name: Crawfish Etouffee Supreme
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a large pan over medium-low heat.
2. Gradually blend flour into the melted butter, stirring until a dark brown roux forms, about 10-15 minutes.
3. Add chopped onions, celery, and bell pepper to the roux. Stir frequently and cook for 2 to 3 minutes until the vegetables are crisp.
4. Incorporate minced garlic and stir for another minute.
5. Pour in chicken broth and bring to a simmer. Cook uncovered for 20 minutes.
6. Stir in parsley, salt, black and red pepper, and Tabasco sauce.
7. Serve the etouffee over cooked rice.
